_about: Independent retrieval-eval set for Lab 2, hand-authored from the real k8s docs. Each item is a natural user question and the doc that owns the answer (gold_source). Metric: hit@k / MRR by gold_source. NOT derived from chunk text (avoids the circular 'answer is its own gold' eval).
